wins_analysis: No wins today. The single HDFCBANK BUY order remained pending and was not filled, indicating the entry price of ₹770.75 was set too aggressively below the market in a trending_up day where prices were moving higher.
losses_analysis: No losses today. However, the failure to execute HDFCBANK (still pending at close) represents an opportunity cost — in a strong uptrend day (+1.1%), waiting for a pullback to a marginal demand zone (score 46) meant missing the move entirely.
regime_impact: The trending_up regime (+1.1%, ADX 25) was favorable for demand zone BUY setups, but the bot underperformed by only finding 1 marginal setup with a zone score of 46 (below the 55 threshold). The regime should have been exploited more aggressively with slightly higher entry prices or breakout strategies rather than deep pullback demand zones.

improvements.action: In trending_up regimes with ADX >= 25, use limit entries within 0.2% of current price rather than waiting for deep demand zone touches — today's HDFCBANK entry at ₹770.75 never filled because the trend carried prices higher
improvements.reason: HDFCBANK order stayed pending all day in a +1.1% Nifty session, indicating demand zone entries are too deep for strong trending days

improvements.action: Enforce the zone_score >= 55 threshold strictly — do NOT place orders on zones scoring 46 even when only 1 setup is available. No trade is better than a marginal trade.
improvements.reason: HDFCBANK zone score was 46, below the 55 minimum from yesterday's learnings. The system overrode its own rule due to scarcity of setups.

improvements.action: Add a breakout/momentum strategy for trending_up days (ADX >= 25) — scan for stocks breaking above previous day high with volume confirmation, targeting 1:2 R:R
improvements.reason: Only 1 demand zone setup was found in a strong trending day. Demand zones work better in range/mean-reversion contexts; trending days need momentum entries to capture moves.

improvements.action: Monitor BPCL short position closely — a SELL position in a trending_up regime with Nifty +1.1% is counter-trend. Trail SL to breakeven if unrealized loss exceeds ₹1.50
improvements.reason: BPCL SELL is still open and counter to the prevailing uptrend; risk of being stopped out increases if broad market momentum continues tomorrow

improvements.action: Expand symbol scanning to include top gainers within Nifty 50 showing intraday pullbacks of 0.3-0.5% from day high during trending_up regimes — these offer better fill probability than deep demand zones
improvements.reason: Today only 1 of 50 stocks generated a setup; broader scan criteria aligned with regime would increase opportunity set without sacrificing quality

tomorrow_focus: If trending_up regime persists, prioritize momentum/breakout entries over deep demand zones, and exit BPCL short at breakeven if Nifty opens strong.

symbol_notes.HDFCBANK: Demand zone at 770.75 never triggered — if price revisits tomorrow with zone score improving, consider entry but only if score >= 55; otherwise skip
symbol_notes.BPCL: Counter-trend short still open — highest priority is managing this position; consider closing if Nifty gaps up or BPCL shows no weakness in first 30 min
